sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The New York Yankees are the most decorated franchise in Major League Baseball history, founded in 1901 and based in the Bronx, New York. They play at Yankee Stadium and compete in the AL East. The Yankees have won 27 World Series championships, the most in MLB history, with an unmatched legacy of stars including Babe Ruth, Lou Gehrig, Joe DiMaggio, Mickey Mantle, Derek Jeter, and Mariano Rivera.
